free_text: First production of pure 155Gd targets and
Institut de Radioprotection et de Surete
- Irradiated for 2 h with 121+/-5 nA proton beam
- 155Gd and monitor foils cooled 2 days after EOB,
- Irradiated for 55 min with 92.4+/-4.8 nA proton beam
No signal of 156gTb from Target #1 at 25.6+/-0.2 MeV
